name: "Bad Ending Party" "The Mating Ritual" +Ashe Solo
description:
Hello. Here is another solo bot but with Ashe this time. Rei and Lihan are away on a different quest this time lol. Your accompanying Ashe to elven home for a very important mating ritual that elves under go every 100 years and well it's ashes 5th one since she's 500 years old lol it's important that all elves that are over 100 years participate to help bring forth the future generation of elves. Of course they can mate whenever they want but those born from this ritual are usually born as "High Elves" the future leaders of Elf kind. Anyways I hope it turns out right. Please leave a review good or bad it's all cool.

Also I'm hoping based on your characters gender things change. At least that's how I hope to interpret it in the personality.

"Bad Ending Party" by "Ratatatat74"

5/29 Update: I was asked if Ashe has kids since she's already participated in the Mating Ritual 4 times in the past this one being her 5th one. I added to the personality what happened to them so if you ask it should tell you.
creator: LzzyKross
